HISTORY
steps t0 contirm Joshua identity; unaware that Sun-Tzu Liao was doing the same for his own reasons. Liao wanted war with the FedCom order take back lost worlds but he acked the military strength to succeed own. By proving FedCom deception over Marik' heir; he hoped t0 push Marik into joint against the Commonwealth. In September 3057 two days after Capellan comman- dos  attempted to Joshua' replacement; Thomas Marik claimed positive proof that the Joshua Marik on New Avalon was duplicate. In retaliation for his rea son"= death, Marik sent troops into the Commor wealth' $ Sarna March. horrified Katherine   publicly denounced Victor' = decep tion_ recalled all Lyran troops her half the Federated Commonwealth and announced the formation the Lyran Alliance_ She then declared her nation neutral, securing the Free Worlds League border and leaving that nation free to fight the Federated Commonwealth: Taking  advantage Marik'$ invasion, Sun- Tzu Liao sent  Capellan troops into the Sarna March to reconquer worlds his grandfather had lost during the Fourth Succession War. Aided by Katherine neutrallty and unit: ed by their hatred for House Davion_ Marik and Liao prosecuted their war against the Federated Commonwealth with surprising speed and success As the threat of wider war in the Inner Sphere loomed political infighting among the Clans intensified The Clans had long been divided into two camps: the Crusaders _ who sought to restore the Star League through conquest, ad the Wardens (which included Wolf s Dragoons) , who believed their responsi- bility   Iay sateguarding the Inner   Sphere until the Great Houses re established the Star League. Many of the Clans, especially Clan Jade Falcon; chafed under the truce that ilKhan Kerensky   had signed and seized any excuse preak Opposition to the Truce of Tukayyid soon erupted in the Refusa War; bitter civil war between Cians Jade Falcon and Wolf. Under orders from ilKhan Kerensky ensure Clan Wolf' sura vival, significant portion of Wolf warriors fled to sanctuary in the Inner Sphere Phelan Kell who had not died action on The Rock; but instead had risen among nis Clan captors become Khan Phelan Ward of Clan Wolf led this remnant the Kell Hounds" homeworld of Arc Royal. The rest of Clan Wolf fought losing battle against the Jade Falcons Both conflicts ended suddenly,in surprising series twists. Having taken back from Victor Davion the worlds that had once belonged to the Free Worlds League, Thomas Marik concluded peace treaty with the Archon prince_ Sun-Tzu Liao_ unwilling continue his own campaign without Marik's backing: grudgingly agreed to end hostilities The Kell Hounds, having refused Katherine Steiner's demand for aid in defending the Lyran Alliance , established an anti-Clan defensive zone cen- tered on Arc Royal. By this act; the mercenary unit carved its Own fiefdom out of Katherine realm: In the oddest turn of events the Wolves who had battled the Jade Falcons briefly merged with that Clan ad then won freedom from their Jade Falcon conquerors_ This new Clan, led by the highly intelligent Khan Vladimir Ward briefly called itself Clan Jade Wolf until Vlad
killed Falcon Khan Elias Crichell. That act gave him the clout to revive nis Clan as the new' Clan Wolf. Intelligence indicates that Khan Vlad will stop at nothing destroy Khan Phelan, leader ot tne Wolves exile THE UNIVERSE TURNED UPSIDE DOWN The first five years after Tukayyid; tumultuous though they were seemed positively tranquil compared with the explosive events of 3058-3061- Those years saw many of the certainties accepted by both the Clans and the Inner Sphere violently over: turned_ giving way t0 new order fraught with possibilities ad perils In the wake of House Liao invasion of the Sarna March_ the Word of Blake seized its chance ad captured Terra_ cradle of humanity and ComStar' $ stronghold_ Troop movements from the Free Worlds League into the so called Chaos March provid- ed cover for the Word of Blake Militia to movt several divisions within striking distance of Terra, just as the high demand for mercenary trOOpS in the March decimated ComStar'$ forces Brion's Legion _ mercenary unit that had constituted nearly half the strength of ComStar'$ Terran Defense Force since the Fourth Succession War; abruptly canceled its contract in favor higher-paying Chaos March assignment: Unwilling to relo cate Com Guard forces from the Clan border; ComStar'$ Precentor Martial replaced Brion'$ Legion with aother merce- nary unit the Twenty-First Centauri Lancers_ The Lancers how- ever, never arrived on Terra Instead the Word of Blake sent its own troops, which masqueraded as the Lancers for long enougn Move the rest their forces into position In Iate February 3058 the Word of Blake struck; The Com Guards on Terra; taken by surprise and unable to use the plan e75 formidable defenses because of Blakist sabotage from the inside, fought bloody but ultimately futile battle across every continent: By early March the Word of Blake held Terra in an iron grip that has yet to be dislodged_ Precentor Martial Focht of ComStar declined to attempt the reconquest of Terra as long as the Clans remained greater threat to the Inner Sphere During those same months; Clan Jade Falcon drove deep into the Lyran Alliance and captured severa planets, until Inner Sphere forces halted them on the world of Coventry: Conceived show of strength in the aftermath of the Refusal War; the Coventry   campaign was have more ominous conse quences for the Clans than the Falcons could have anticipated On Coventry; the Falcons met coalition force from across the Inner Sphere_ led Prince Victor   Steiner Davion the Federated Commonwealth: The Inner Sphere and Jade Falcon armies were eveniy matched; neither side could win Coventry without protracted and bloody battle_ and both commanders realized At the same time_ Khan Vlad of Clan Wolf was threat: ening the Falcons with strikes at worlds in the Jade Falcon occu: pation zone: Prince Victor invoked the Clan rite of safcon to ensure safe landing for his troops ad then offered Falcon Khan Marthe Pryde the only honorable way out-_hegira, the tra ditional right of deteated enemy to eave the field with forces
